description: Declared bindings from NOOS classification routes (from the observability-semantics change) to Motor recipes. status=WIRED means a registered machine owner consumes the route; status=NOT_WIRED means NOOS classifies and routes correctly but no registered machine owner executes the recipe yet. Correctly stopping without repair is safer than incorrectly restarting production.
not_wired_is_safe: A route with no machine_owner surfaces the finding and stops. It never falls back to execution restart.

bindings.note: Track D — WIRED. The registered machine owner consumes an INCIDENT-DIAGNOSE routing row (schema noos-motor-routing-row-v1) for DISPATCHING_COMPLETION_UNPROVEN and runs RECEIPT-WRITER-REPAIR-001 in an evidence-path-only git_worktree sandbox: BEFORE from the diagnosis receipt, bounded keyed retries (L13, duplicate-proof), AFTER via the observer read path; states.recovery=PROVEN only from the external before/after pair. Escalates to a founder-decision artifact if evidence is not restored — never restarts execution.
Handled today by the existing reconcile/self-heal loop; not yet a registered Motor recipe/job.
Divergence between dispatch and completion observers routes to a diagnosis, not a repair.
Authoritative source unqueryable — diagnose the monitoring path, do not touch execution.

PROPOSED per NF-UNIFIED-MOTOR-ISSUE-CI-OWNERSHIP-V1 (SG_REVIEW_REQUIRED). The NOOS Issue Manager (noetfield:noos.issue-manager) classifies a failed required check; ONLY failure_classification=candidate_caused routes here — to the SANDBOX Builder Owner (noetfield:sandbox.builder-owner) running NF-MOTOR-CI-REPAIR-001 in a git_worktree sandbox via a bounded worker (Codex Cloud/SDK). NOT_WIRED = no registered machine owner executes yet: NOOS classifies + surfaces the finding and STOPS (correctly stopping beats wrongly repairing). Non-candidate classes never route here — workflow-logic defects and flaky tests -> CI Reliability Owner (noetfield:noos.ci-reliability-owner); runner outages -> NOOS Platform Operations; missing/expired secrets -> SG/Secrets + founder gate; production promotion -> Release Owner.
